title: Hollywood and Vine
writer: Edith Watkins, Charles Williams, Robert Wohlmuth
actors: James Ellison, Wanda McKay, Franklin Pangborn
plot: A young girl arrives in Hollywood determined to become a star in the movies, but finds that attaining stardom is a lot more difficult than she counted on. However, she does become a star of sorts--as the owner of a dog who DOES be...
